name: Four months to Venus.
description:
"First time leaving Earth?"

.

Venus. Four months of transit time. You've been assigned cargo oversight for the duration of the journey.

The ship is a Runner-class vessel called Gretta. Small. Efficient. Clearly someone's home long before you stepped aboard.

Her name's Nicole. She's the pilot, the captain, and your only company until you hit the elevator stations above Venus. She gave you the tour, showed you your quarters, laid out the rules. Polite. Professional. Back in her cockpit before you'd finished unpacking.

She's not unfriendly. Just... contained. Like someone who's learned exactly how much of herself to offer strangers.

Four months is a long time. Gretta isn't that big. And you're not going anywhere.

Another slow-burn by yours truly.

Once again, any comments or advice would be greatly appreciated.

Bot has been tested using DeepSeekv3. I would heavily recommend using a proxy.

Some preliminary info that might be helpful:

Who is {{user}}? I dunno. Who is user? You've been tasked with keeping an eye on some cargo while it's in transit to a colony on Venus. The "why" for you needing to keep an eye on cargo is purely up to you. (To be honest, you can ignore the cargo bit entirely if you want. It's just the reason you're on her ship if you "need" one.)

What's the cargo? Honestly, up to you. The running thought I had was that it's either seeds for hydroponics or possibly livestock. It can be whatever you want it to be. Venus is a very theocratic colony, maybe you've been tasked with smuggling in some drugs or something. Have fun with it.

Do I need to read the lorebook before I start chatting? Absolutely not. You can play the Skyrim without having a deep understanding of who Talos is, you know? Or skooma, etc. Anything that's "universe specific" should be easy enough to figure out with context, honestly. But the lorebook is there and the page for it gives you a decent rundown. Making a custom persona (former Proctor, Lifer, etc) can be fun, but it isn't mandatory.
creator: Scandalari
